segments.speaker: 题目6/7
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Have you checked out the new restaurant downtown? The sushi is made by an award winning chef and is absolutely top notch. I'd love to, but I'm saving money for a vacation. Do you have specific plans? Not yet, but I'd love to spend a month somewhere in nature. Have you considered a camping trip? You could just pack a tent and a sleeping bag into your car and travel all around the mountains while sleeping at campsites. No need for hotels or plane tickets. Well, I do love me a comfortable bed at the end of an eventful day.
